payload.input: Pastor Jim nods, closing his eyes, bowing his head. Maya kneels beside Ethan, their shoulders touching, her hand finding his in the space between their bodies, squeezing hard enough to leave marks. They bow their heads, and as the pastor begins to speak—"Heavenly Father, we thank You for these precious children, for their purity of heart..."—Maya opens her eyes and looks up at the closet doors. Through the slats, she sees Julian’s eye, wide and dark, watching her. His tongue darts out, licking his lower lip, and Vivian’s hand is visible on his chest, pinching his nipple through his shirt, her other hand busy below the frame of the slats, working him slowly while he records the prayer below. "Keep them safe from the snares of the devil," Pastor Jim intones, his voice rising in pastoral cadence. "Guard their minds and their bodies. Let no unclean thing enter this house."  Maya’s lips move in silent amen, her fingers tracing circles on Ethan’s palm, the ring digging into his flesh. She holds Julian’s gaze through the wooden slats, watching the pleasure slacken his face, watching Vivian’s hair sway as she works him, the voyeurism of it making her own breath come faster, making her squirm against the carpet. "Amen," they all say together. Pastor Jim stands, brushing off his knees, satisfied, his pastoral duty discharged. He hugs them both—Ethan stiffly, Maya warmly, her breasts pressing against his chest through the layers of fabric—and moves toward the door. "I’ll tell your parents you’re thriving," he says, his hand on the knob. "God bless you both. Stay strong."  The door closes with a click that sounds like a starting gun. Maya waits until the car pulls away, until the engine fades, before she turns and runs for the stairs, Ethan behind her, both of them breathless and laughing and wild.
